subject: Houston, we got an offer 🚀
body:
...but it disappears when Artemis II returns to earth.

Денис, whether you're learning System Design, getting hands-on with AI tools, or prepping for your next coding interview — now's your window to launch.

This offer only lasts until Artemis II returns to earth on Friday. Take advantage before it does!
